input.content:
fix: add missing docstring entries for prompt parameters

Add missing Args descriptions for new prompt-related parameters
(append_system_prompt, system_prompt_replace, system_prompt,
project_prompt, system_messages) across claude_code_cli.py,
langchain/__init__.py, and langchain/agent.py.

Add missing Returns sections to all public functions in
prompts/prompt_loader.py.

Fixes 13 ruff docstring errors (7 D417, 6 DOC201).
